properties.remark: REDUCED VISIBILITIES FROM DUST STORM RESULTED IN A TRAFFIC ACCIDENT NORTH OF RED ROCK ON INTERSTATE 10. THREE VEHICLES WERE INVOLVED WITH ONE BEING A JACK KNIFED TRACTOR TRAILER. NO INJURIES.
